title: Vietnamese Rice Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious bowl filled with spring vegetables, aromatic rice, and a sweet and spicy sauce.
instructions: Cook the Vialone Nano Rice according to the package instructions.
In a pan, heat the Sesame Oil over medium heat. Add the Pumpkin Seeds and cook until fragrant.
Add the Spring Onions to the pan and cook until softened.
In a separate pan, combine the Pilaf Rice, Sweet Rice Vinegar, and Vietnamese Chili Sauce. Cook until heated through.
To assemble the bowl, place the cooked rice at the bottom, followed by the vegetables and pumpkin seeds.
Drizzle the Sweet Rice Vinegar and Vietnamese Chili Sauce mixture over the top.
Garnish with additional Spring Onions and Pumpkin Seeds, if desired.
